label_verbatim: (Name of Corporation as it appears on the records of the Secretary of State)
rationale: Top-of-form: corporation's Maine-registered name (domestic-entity convention).

label_verbatim: FIRST: All restated statements required to be set forth in Articles of Incorporation (*MNPCA-6-1) are attached as Exhibit ___
rationale: Inline blank for the exhibit letter that holds the full restated articles. Reuses CORP_MBCA-6A's restatement.text_exhibit_letter (same form pattern, 13-B nonprofit analogue of 13-C §1007).
Date the restatement was adopted by the corporation. Form-scoped to restatement.* (parallel to amendment.adoption_date on MBCA-9).

label_verbatim: By the members at a meeting at which a quorum was present and the restatement received at least a majority of the votes which members were entitled to cast.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'members_majority_at_meeting'.

label_verbatim: (If the Articles require more than a majority vote.) By the members at a meeting at which the restatement received at least the percentage of votes required by the Articles of Incorporation.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'members_supermajority_at_meeting' (when entity's articles require more than a majority).

label_verbatim: By the written consent of all members entitled to vote with respect thereto.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'members_written_consent'.

label_verbatim: (If no members, or none entitled to vote thereon.) By majority vote of the board of directors.
rationale: Fourth mutually-exclusive adoption-method box (board majority; only when no members are entitled to vote) - geometry+text places it at y=502.2, directly below Check Box6 and above the SECOND heading. The migration-era inventory swapped it with Check Box10.

Maine SOS CRA Public Number; required when registered_agent.type='commercial'. Note widget rect y=227 places it visually adjacent to the Noncommercial radio rather than the Commercial radio (template layout quirk) — semantically belongs to commercial path per label.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; enum_select value 'commercial'. Pairs with Text7 (CRA Public Number) and Text11 (CRA name).
Name of registered agent (commercial path). Filler uses the same registered_agent.name regardless of path.

Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; enum_select value 'noncommercial'. Pairs with Text12 (NCRA name). The migration-era inventory misread this widget as the board-majority adoption box (that is Check Box8).
Name of registered agent (noncommercial path).

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Maine physical address of the registered agent (single-line widget).
Optional mailing address of the registered agent.
Signature-row date on left of page 2.

label_verbatim: **By ___ (signature) / type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Shape D — combined name+capacity. Per footnote ** the form 'MUST be signed by any duly authorized officer' (13-B MRSA §104.1.B).

label_verbatim: **By ___ (signature) / type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Second signer slot (Shape D). The page lays out two parallel **By blocks. Likely intended for a second authorized officer, OR for the clerk/secretary co-signing alongside the primary officer when a member vote was used. The MUST-BE-COMPLETED-FOR-VOTE-OF-MEMBERS box on the same page contains a SEPARATE wet-ink signature line for the clerk/secretary attesting custody of minutes — see open_questions.
Cover-letter row 1; universal handle for entity name on this filing. C-prefix widget naming is specific to the alternate 'Filer Contact Cover Letter' template.
Cover-letter row 2 (used when one cover letter accompanies multiple filings).

label_verbatim: List type of filing(s) enclosed (i.e. Articles of Incorporation, Articles of Merger, ...) [line 1]
rationale: First line of the free-text 'list type of filings enclosed' block. This block is unique to the alternate cover-letter template — the standard cover-letter primitive does not include it. Two-line widget uses .line{1,2} per MARK1 convention.
Second (continuation) line of the enclosed-filings block.
Expedite tier = 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier = '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier = 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees enclosed (base $40 per Maine SOS fee schedule for nonprofit restatement, plus expedite premium).
Filing-question contact name.
Daytime telephone for contact.
Per-filing contact email. Note: this alternate cover-letter template has no separate annual-report-reminder-email widget.
Attested-copy recipient name.
Recipient firm/company.
Recipient street/PO box.
Recipient city/state/zip combined.
